title: Shiosai
writer: Yukio Mishima, Shin'ichirô Nakamura, Senkichi Taniguchi
actors: Akira Kubo, Sadako Sawamura, Minoru Takashima
plot: Lonely youth Shinji meets Hatsue, a pretty pearl diver, on the beach and the two fall in love. But Shinji has a rival for Hatsue's affections, Yasuo. Yasuo spreads unpleasant gossip about his rival, and Hatsue's father forbids her...
